lines.english: Lesson 131
lines.raw: Lesson 131 | 第131课

lines.english: Don't be so sure!
lines.raw: Don't be so sure! | 别那么肯定！

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: What's the problem about deciding on a holiday?
lines.raw: What's the problem about deciding on a holiday? | 决定度假有什么问题？

lines.english: Where are you going to spend your holidays this year, Gary?
lines.chinese: 盖瑞，今年你打算去哪儿度假？
lines.raw: Where are you going to spend your holidays this year, Gary? | 盖瑞，今年你打算去哪儿度假？

lines.english: We may go abroad.
lines.raw: We may go abroad. | 我们可能会出国。

lines.english: I'm not sure.
lines.raw: I'm not sure. | 我不确定。

lines.english: My wife wants to go to Egypt.
lines.raw: My wife wants to go to Egypt. | 我妻子想去埃及。

lines.english: I'd like to go there, too.
lines.raw: I'd like to go there, too. | 我也想去那儿。

lines.english: We can't make up our minds.
lines.raw: We can't make up our minds. | 我们拿不定主意。

lines.english: Will you travel by sea or by air?
lines.chinese: 你们是坐船去还是坐飞机去？
lines.raw: Will you travel by sea or by air? | 你们是坐船去还是坐飞机去？

lines.english: We may travel by sea.
lines.raw: We may travel by sea. | 我们可能会坐船去。

lines.english: It's cheaper, isn't it?
lines.raw: It's cheaper, isn't it? | 坐船便宜些，不是吗？

lines.english: It may be cheaper, but it takes a long time.
lines.chinese: 也许便宜些，但要花很多时间。
lines.raw: It may be cheaper, but it takes a long time. | 也许便宜些，但要花很多时间。

lines.english: I'm sure you'll enjoy yourselves.
lines.chinese: 我相信你们会玩得开心的。
lines.raw: I'm sure you'll enjoy yourselves. | 我相信你们会玩得开心的。

lines.english: Don't be so sure.
lines.raw: Don't be so sure. | 别那么肯定。

lines.english: We might not go anywhere.
lines.chinese: 我们可能哪儿都去不了。
lines.raw: We might not go anywhere. | 我们可能哪儿都去不了。

lines.english: My wife always worries too much.
lines.raw: My wife always worries too much. | 我妻子总是忧虑太多。

lines.english: Who's going to look after the dog?
lines.raw: Who's going to look after the dog? | 谁来照看狗呢？

lines.english: Who's going to look after the house?
lines.raw: Who's going to look after the house? | 谁来照看房子呢？

lines.english: Who's going to look after the garden?
lines.raw: Who's going to look after the garden? | 谁来照看花园呢？

lines.english: We have this problem every year.
lines.chinese: 我们每年都有这个问题。
lines.raw: We have this problem every year. | 我们每年都有这个问题。

lines.english: In the end, we stay at home and look after everything!
lines.chinese: 结果，我们待在家里照看一切！
lines.raw: In the end, we stay at home and look after everything! | 结果，我们待在家里照看一切！
